items.title: Deploying enterprise stablecoin rails on Solana in days with Crossmint
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of enterprise stablecoin infrastructure on Solana enhances its appeal for businesses, potentially increasing transaction volume and liquidity.

items.title: LayerZero, Keeta enable tokenized bank deposits across Ethereum, Solana and Base
items.whyYouShouldCare: The integration of tokenized bank deposits across multiple chains, including Solana, could drive cross-chain liquidity and broaden user adoption.

items.title: Abu Dhabi's Mubadala Capital joins tokenization push as Coinbase takes stake in onchain fund
items.whyYouShouldCare: Mubadala Capital's involvement in tokenization alongside Coinbase signals growing institutional interest in on-chain assets, which may bolster Solana's ecosystem credibility.
